title: Crunchy Show-Off Mexican Rolled Oats Tinga
description: A sweet and crunchy twist on traditional Mexican tinga, featuring rolled oats, with an Ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly twist. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the rolled oats, cocoa powder, sugar, and manteca, and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is fragrant and lightly toasted.
Add the cinnamon, cayenne pepper, and lime juice to the saucepan, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for 1-2 minutes, until the mixture is smooth and fragrant.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the coconut oil and salt until well combined.
Add the chopped pistachios to the bowl and stir until they are evenly distributed.
Spoon the mixture onto a sheet pan or plate and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set.
Once set, use a spatula or spoon to shape the mixture into small rolls.
Serve the rolled oats tinga chilled, garnished with additional pistachios and a sprinkle of cinnamon, if desired.
